codeReview.summary: Implemented golden sample testing module for procedure validation before promotion. The implementation includes GoldenSample struct, GoldenSampleStore trait (SQLite-backed), GoldenSampleTester, and GoldenSampleService. Supports 8 validation criterion types, configurable pass rate threshold (default 80%), and automatic flagging for review on failure. 37 tests pass covering all core functionality.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and passes review. Worker followed proper Rust coding conventions (async_trait, thiserror, sqlx patterns). All verification steps passed (build, tests, clippy). No blocking issues found.
